characters.description: Earth's Heaven's Anointed Forerunner and System Mediator. The System places responsibility for Earth's survival, advancement, portals, and off-world agreements under his authority.
characters.name: Silas Renner

characters.description: Silas's trusted Forerunner ally and evolution specialist.
characters.name: Asta

characters.description: Silas's off-world mentor and a Rayden clansman.
characters.name: Samvek

characters.description: A trusted Earth Forerunner ally and major defender.
characters.name: Jiang

characters.description: A combatant selected for Silas's team responding to the Dubai incursion.
characters.name: Cease

characters.description: Silas's mother and the fire-talented Forerunner previously known as Cease. She is allied with Rayden and the Adventurers Guild and receives a ritual meant to repair weaknesses caused by rapid advancement.
characters.name: Cecilia Renner

characters.description: A military ally whom Asta consults for candidates capable of helping administer Silas's new authority.
characters.name: General Krulak

characters.description: The Lepun leader allied with Silas. Her people supply liaisons and defenders as Earth organizes against its new threats.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: An Epic-tier Lepun liaison and protector assigned to Silas's team for the response to the Dubai incursion.
characters.name: Scratch

characters.description: A frontline fighter who accompanies Silas to Dubai. He regards Silas's household as family, and Silas accepts him as an adopted brother.
characters.name: Crag

characters.description: A scout selected to accompany Silas on the mission to the Dubai incursion.
characters.name: Dory

characters.description: One of two planners given substantial purchasing authority to prepare a coordinated supply proposal for Earth's governments.
characters.name: Talia

characters.description: One of Silas's delegated purchasing planners, responsible with Talia for developing a cross-government acquisition plan.
characters.name: Nevin

characters.description: Silas's Eidolon, summoned as crucial reinforcement for the Dubai mission.
characters.name: Urg

characters.description: A Dubai civilian defender who repeatedly risks himself to draw monsters away from fleeing people. He questions Silas's authority but is willing to cooperate after seeing him protect civilians.
characters.name: Omar Hassan

characters.description: The senior officer commanding the Dubai invasion force. This commander promises protected passage for Silas's party and begins official talks with him.
characters.name: the Dubai invading commander

characters.description: A rival off-world Forerunner directing the organized Sydney incursion through wind and water mana.
characters.name: the opposing Forerunner

characters.description: A political ally who warns Silas that coalition members object to the Dubai truce while Earth's defenders are stretched across several continents.
characters.name: President Wilson

characters.description: A senator participating in the home team's political deliberations as worldwide monster attacks strain the alliance.
characters.name: Senator Corbin

characters.description: Sydney's former commissioner. Silas places this official in charge of the city and nearby territory as a system-recognized subordinate ruler.
characters.name: the former Sydney commissioner

characters.description: A dragon reported to have attacked near Stonehenge with enough power to overwhelm Samvek.
characters.name: the red dragon

characters.description: A political conspirator who helps time the abduction of Silas's mother as leverage against him, working with an off-world trader and a hostile envoy.
characters.name: Connie Simmons

characters.description: An off-world corporate representative who takes part in the operation using Silas's mother as leverage against him.
characters.name: the corporate representative

characters.description: Silas's sister. She stands with him during the Alliance confrontation and executes the envoy from Mexico.
characters.name: Silas's sister

characters.description: A rare human cultivator and advocate for the Divided Realms. His competing system makes his capabilities difficult for the heavens system to assess.
characters.name: Dutch

characters.description: A human-born, dragon-bonded demigoddess who arrives to stop the wounded red dragon's execution. She says the dragon acted without authorization and offers accountability and compensation.
characters.name: Camille Westfork

characters.description: Chosen for life to speak for Rigel's displaced population, she can perceive her constituents' needs and fears. She handles talks with Silas while military authority remains with their commander.
characters.name: the refugee Imprinter

characters.description: The Rigel refugee military commander who becomes Silas's direct contact during the Night's Fall emergency.
characters.name: General Yakima

characters.description: A Rigel fire mage assigned to escort Silas. Silas channels mana into the mage's attack, advancing the spell enough to destroy otherwise resilient infiltrators.
characters.name: the Rigel fire mage

characters.description: The retreating Night's Fall horde produces a self-aware humanoid entity concentrated near legendary strength.
characters.name: the Night's Fall entity

characters.description: A peak-rare Rayden mage, fighter, and administrator responsible for organizing the clan's newly arrived expedition and its Earth compound.
characters.name: the Rayden expedition administrator

characters.description: A merchant corporation's provisional sales manager for Earth. The manager represents the company while delivering its promised goods.
characters.name: the merchant manager

characters.description: A peak-rare Lepun warrior selected by Vex to replace Scratch on Silas's active field team.
characters.name: Leon

characters.description: A peak-rare Lepun shaman chosen by Vex as one of Silas's new field escorts.
characters.name: the Lepun shaman

characters.description: A Rayden fighter who joins Silas's party for the planned response to the giant-snake crisis in Manhattan.
characters.name: the Rayden warrior

characters.description: The seventy-third son of a peak family's lord. He receives Silas aboard the family's dimensional platform under a promise of safe passage.
characters.name: the peak-family lesser prince

characters.description: A pending princess and army captain from the peak family. Suppressed to rare tier for the meeting, she challenges Silas to a spar as a test of his worth.
characters.name: the peak-family pending princess
